forms.formDescription: Standardized PHQ-9/GAD-7 mental health screening for EHR integration.
forms.taskVariable: [{"key": "applicationId", "label": "Submission Id", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "applicationStatus", "label": "Submission Status", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "submitterEmail", "label": "Submitter Email", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "patientId", "label": "Patient ID", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "medicalRecordNumber", "label": "Medical Record Number", "type": "textfield"}, {"key": "phq9Total", "label": "PHQ-9 Total Score", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "gad7Total", "label": "GAD-7 Total Score", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "phq9SafetyFlag", "label": "PHQ-9 Safety Flag", "type": "hidden"}, {"key": "needsClinicalReview", "label": "Needs Clinical Review", "type": "hidden"}]

components.label: Medical Record Number (MRN)
components.description: Populated automatically when launched from EHR

components.label: EHR Patient ID
components.description: Epic patient identifier — do not edit

components.html: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?
components.label: PHQ-9 Instructions
1. Little interest or pleasure in doing things
3. Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much
4. Feeling tired or having little energy
6. Feeling bad about yourself — or that you are a failure, or have let yourself or your family down
7. Trouble concentrating on things, such as reading the newspaper or watching television
8. Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed, or the opposite — being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual
9. Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself in some way
components.description: If you are having thoughts of harming yourself, please contact your care team immediately or call/text 988 (Suicide & Crisis Lifeline).

components.html: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?
components.label: GAD-7 Instructions
1. Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
2. Not being able to stop or control worrying
3. Worrying too much about different things
5. Being so restless that it's hard to sit still
7. Feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen
Clinician Review
components.title: Clinician Review

components.label: Complete Review
Submit Screening

workflows.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn:definitions xmlns:bpmn="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" xmlns:camunda="http://camunda.org/schema/1.0/bpmn" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" id="Definitions_MentalHealthScreening" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn" exporter="Camunda Modeler" exporterVersion="5.48.0">
  <bpmn:collaboration id="Collaboration_MentalHealthScreening">
    <bpmn:participant id="Participant_MentalHealthScreening" name="Mental Health Screening" processRef="mental-health-screening-workflow" />
  </bpmn:collaboration>
  <bpmn:process id="mental-health-screening-workflow" name="Mental Health Screening (PHQ-9 / GAD-7)" isExecutable="true" camunda:versionTag="1">
    <bpmn:laneSet id="LaneSet_MentalHealthScreening">
      <bpmn:lane id="Lane_Patient" name="Patient / Submitter">
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>StartEvent_PatientSubmit</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
      </bpmn:lane>
      <bpmn:lane id="Lane_Clinician" name="Clinician / Reviewer">
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_ClinicianReview_SafetyAlert</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_ClinicianReview_Standard</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
      </bpmn:lane>
      <bpmn:lane id="Lane_System" name="System (EHR Integration)">
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Gateway_ScreeningTriage</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_SendSafetyAlertEmail</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_BuildReviewObservationAndDocRefPayload</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_WriteReviewObservationToEpic</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_WriteReviewDocumentReferenceToEpic</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_UpdateStatusReviewed</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>EndEvent_ReviewedAndWrittenBack</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_BuildAutoObservationPayload</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_WriteAutoObservationToEpic</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>Task_UpdateStatusAutoCompleted</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
        <bpmn:flowNodeRef>EndEvent_AutoCompleted</bpmn:flowNodeRef>
      </bpmn:lane>
    </bpmn:laneSet>
    <bpmn:startEvent id="StartEvent_PatientSubmit" name="Patient Submits Screening" camunda:initiator="start_userId">
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Start_To_Gateway</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Start_To_Gateway" sourceRef="StartEvent_PatientSubmit" targetRef="Gateway_ScreeningTriage">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="take">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'New');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener" event="take">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener" event="take" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:exclusiveGateway id="Gateway_ScreeningTriage" name="Needs Clinical Review?" default="Flow_Gateway_To_AutoBuild">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Start_To_Gateway</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Gateway_To_SafetyAlert</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Gateway_To_StandardReview</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Gateway_To_AutoBuild</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:exclusiveGateway>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_To_SafetyAlert" name="Safety Alert" sourceRef="Gateway_ScreeningTriage" targetRef="Task_SendSafetyAlertEmail">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">
        ${phq9SafetyFlag == true}
      </bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_To_StandardReview" name="Needs Review" sourceRef="Gateway_ScreeningTriage" targetRef="Task_ClinicianReview_Standard">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">
        ${needsClinicalReview == true}
      </bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_To_AutoBuild" name="Auto Complete" sourceRef="Gateway_ScreeningTriage" targetRef="Task_BuildAutoObservationPayload" />
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_SendSafetyAlertEmail" name="Send Safety Alert Email">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="to">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
                execution.getVariable('reviewerEmail') || execution.getVariable('submitterEmail') || 'reviewer@example.com';
              </camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="subject">URGENT: PHQ-9 Safety Screen Positive - Immediate Review Required</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="text">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">var patientId = execution.getVariable('patientId');
var applicationId = execution.getVariable('applicationId');
var msg = "A patient screening has flagged a positive response on the PHQ-9 self-harm item (Question 9).\n\n";
msg += "Patient ID: " + patientId + "\n";
msg += "Application ID: " + applicationId + "\n\n";
msg += "Please review this submission immediately in the FormsFlow task list.";
msg;</camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>mail-send</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Gateway_To_SafetyAlert</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_SafetyEmail_To_SafetyReview</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_SafetyEmail_To_SafetyReview" sourceRef="Task_SendSafetyAlertEmail" targetRef="Task_ClinicianReview_SafetyAlert" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_SafetyReview_To_BuildPayload" sourceRef="Task_ClinicianReview_SafetyAlert" targetRef="Task_BuildReviewObservationAndDocRefPayload" />
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_StandardReview_To_BuildPayload" sourceRef="Task_ClinicianReview_Standard" targetRef="Task_BuildReviewObservationAndDocRefPayload" />
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Task_BuildReviewObservationAndDocRefPayload" name="Build Review Observation + DocRef Payload" scriptFormat="javascript">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_SafetyReview_To_BuildPayload</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_StandardReview_To_BuildPayload</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_BuildReviewPayload_To_WriteObservation</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script>
        var patientId = execution.getVariable('patientId');
        var applicationId = execution.getVariable('applicationId');
        var phq9Total = execution.getVariable('phq9Total');
        var gad7Total = execution.getVariable('gad7Total');
        var clinicianNotes = execution.getVariable('clinicianNotes') || '';

        var observations = JSON.stringify([
          { code: '44249-1', display: 'PHQ-9 total score', value: phq9Total },
          { code: '70274-6', display: 'GAD-7 total score', value: gad7Total }
        ]);
        execution.setVariable('observationsPayload', observations);

        var docText = 'PHQ-9 total score: ' + phq9Total + '. GAD-7 total score: ' + gad7Total + '. Clinician notes: ' + clinicianNotes;
        execution.setVariable('documentReferenceText', docText);
      </bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_BuildReviewPayload_To_WriteObservation" sourceRef="Task_BuildReviewObservationAndDocRefPayload" targetRef="Task_WriteReviewObservationToEpic" />
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_WriteReviewObservationToEpic" name="Write Observation to Epic">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="url">${EHR_CONNECTOR_URL}/epic/observation-create</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="method">POST</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="headers">
              <camunda:map>
                <camunda:entry key="Content-Type">application/json</camunda:entry>
              </camunda:map>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="payload">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">JSON.stringify({
  "patientId": execution.getVariable('patientId'),
  "applicationId": String(execution.getVariable('applicationId')),
  "observations": JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('observationsPayload'))
});</camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:outputParameter name="observationResponse">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">var responseBody = connector.getVariable("response");
responseBody;</camunda:script>
            </camunda:outputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>http-connector</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_BuildReviewPayload_To_WriteObservation</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_WriteObservation_To_WriteDocRef</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_WriteObservation_To_WriteDocRef" sourceRef="Task_WriteReviewObservationToEpic" targetRef="Task_WriteReviewDocumentReferenceToEpic" />
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_WriteReviewDocumentReferenceToEpic" name="Write DocumentReference to Epic">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="url">${EHR_CONNECTOR_URL}/epic/documentreference-create</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="method">POST</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="headers">
              <camunda:map>
                <camunda:entry key="Content-Type">application/json</camunda:entry>
              </camunda:map>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="payload">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">JSON.stringify({
  "patientId": execution.getVariable('patientId'),
  "applicationId": String(execution.getVariable('applicationId')),
  "documentText": execution.getVariable('documentReferenceText'),
  "documentTitle": "Mental Health Screening Summary"
});</camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:outputParameter name="documentReferenceResponse">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">var responseBody = connector.getVariable("response");
responseBody;</camunda:script>
            </camunda:outputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>http-connector</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_WriteObservation_To_WriteDocRef</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_WriteDocRef_To_UpdateReviewed</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_WriteDocRef_To_UpdateReviewed" sourceRef="Task_WriteReviewDocumentReferenceToEpic" targetRef="Task_UpdateStatusReviewed" />
    <bpmn:task id="Task_UpdateStatusReviewed" name="Update Status Reviewed">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'Reviewed');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener" event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener" event="start" />
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener" event="end" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_WriteDocRef_To_UpdateReviewed</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_UpdateReviewed_To_End</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_UpdateReviewed_To_End" sourceRef="Task_UpdateStatusReviewed" targetRef="EndEvent_ReviewedAndWrittenBack" />
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_ReviewedAndWrittenBack" name="Reviewed and Written Back">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_UpdateReviewed_To_End</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:scriptTask id="Task_BuildAutoObservationPayload" name="Build Auto Observation Payload" scriptFormat="javascript">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Gateway_To_AutoBuild</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_BuildAutoPayload_To_WriteObservation</bpmn:outgoing>
      <bpmn:script>
        var phq9Total = execution.getVariable('phq9Total');
        var gad7Total = execution.getVariable('gad7Total');

        var observations = JSON.stringify([
          { code: '44249-1', display: 'PHQ-9 total score', value: phq9Total },
          { code: '70274-6', display: 'GAD-7 total score', value: gad7Total }
        ]);
        execution.setVariable('observationsPayload', observations);
      </bpmn:script>
    </bpmn:scriptTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_BuildAutoPayload_To_WriteObservation" sourceRef="Task_BuildAutoObservationPayload" targetRef="Task_WriteAutoObservationToEpic" />
    <bpmn:serviceTask id="Task_WriteAutoObservationToEpic" name="Write Observation to Epic">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:connector>
          <camunda:inputOutput>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="url">${EHR_CONNECTOR_URL}/epic/observation-create</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="method">POST</camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="headers">
              <camunda:map>
                <camunda:entry key="Content-Type">application/json</camunda:entry>
              </camunda:map>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:inputParameter name="payload">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">JSON.stringify({
  "patientId": execution.getVariable('patientId'),
  "applicationId": String(execution.getVariable('applicationId')),
  "observations": JSON.parse(execution.getVariable('observationsPayload'))
});</camunda:script>
            </camunda:inputParameter>
            <camunda:outputParameter name="observationResponse">
              <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">var responseBody = connector.getVariable("response");
responseBody;</camunda:script>
            </camunda:outputParameter>
          </camunda:inputOutput>
          <camunda:connectorId>http-connector</camunda:connectorId>
        </camunda:connector>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_BuildAutoPayload_To_WriteObservation</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_WriteAutoObservation_To_UpdateCompleted</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:serviceTask>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_WriteAutoObservation_To_UpdateCompleted" sourceRef="Task_WriteAutoObservationToEpic" targetRef="Task_UpdateStatusAutoCompleted" />
    <bpmn:task id="Task_UpdateStatusAutoCompleted" name="Update Status Auto Completed">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:executionListener event="start">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            execution.setVariable('applicationStatus', 'Completed');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.BPMFormDataPipelineListener" event="start">
          <camunda:field name="fields">
            <camunda:expression>["applicationId","applicationStatus"]</camunda:expression>
          </camunda:field>
        </camunda:executionListener>
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.FormSubmissionListener" event="start" />
        <camunda:executionListener class="org.camunda.bpm.extension.hooks.listeners.ApplicationStateListener" event="end" />
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_WriteAutoObservation_To_UpdateCompleted</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_UpdateCompleted_To_End</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:task>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_UpdateCompleted_To_End" sourceRef="Task_UpdateStatusAutoCompleted" targetRef="EndEvent_AutoCompleted" />
    <bpmn:endEvent id="EndEvent_AutoCompleted" name="Auto-Completed">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_UpdateCompleted_To_End</bpmn:incoming>
    </bpmn:endEvent>
    <bpmn:userTask id="Task_ClinicianReview_SafetyAlert" name="Clinician Review (Safety Alert)" camunda:candidateGroups="formsflow/formsflow-reviewer">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:taskListener event="complete">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            task.setVariable('deleteReason', 'completed');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:taskListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_SafetyEmail_To_SafetyReview</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_SafetyReview_To_BuildPayload</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:userTask>
    <bpmn:userTask id="Task_ClinicianReview_Standard" name="Clinician Review" camunda:candidateGroups="formsflow/formsflow-reviewer">
      <bpmn:extensionElements>
        <camunda:taskListener event="complete">
          <camunda:script scriptFormat="javascript">
            task.setVariable('deleteReason', 'completed');
          </camunda:script>
        </camunda:taskListener>
      </bpmn:extensionElements>
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_Gateway_To_StandardReview</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_StandardReview_To_BuildPayload</bpmn:outgoing>
    </bpmn:userTask>
  </bpmn:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_MentalHealthScreening">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_MentalHealthScreening" bpmnElement="Collaboration_MentalHealthScreening">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Participant_MentalHealthScreening_di" bpmnElement="Participant_MentalHealthScreening" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="120" y="80" width="1500" height="620" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Lane_System_di" bpmnElement="Lane_System" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="150" y="380" width="1470" height="320" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Lane_Clinician_di" bpmnElement="Lane_Clinician" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="150" y="220" width="1470" height="160" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Lane_Patient_di" bpmnElement="Lane_Patient" isHorizontal="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="150" y="80" width="1470" height="140" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="StartEvent_PatientSubmit_di" bpmnElement="StartEvent_PatientSubmit">
        <dc:Bounds x="212" y="132" width="36" height="36" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="191" y="175" width="79" height="27" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Gateway_ScreeningTriage_di" bpmnElement="Gateway_ScreeningTriage" isMarkerVisible="true">
        <dc:Bounds x="325" y="415" width="50" height="50" />
        <bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
          <dc:Bounds x="300" y="472" width="100" height="27" />
        </bpmndi:BPMNLabel>
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_SendSafetyAlertEmail_di" bpmnElement="Task_SendSafetyAlertEmail">
        <dc:Bounds x="440" y="400" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_BuildReviewObservationAndDocRefPayload_di" bpmnElement="Task_BuildReviewObservationAndDocRefPayload">
        <dc:Bounds x="800" y="400" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_WriteReviewObservationToEpic_di" bpmnElement="Task_WriteReviewObservationToEpic">
        <dc:Bounds x="960" y="400" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_WriteReviewDocumentReferenceToEpic_di" bpmnElement="Task_WriteReviewDocumentReferenceToEpic">
        <dc:Bounds x="1120" y="400" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_UpdateStatusReviewed_di" bpmnElement="Task_UpdateStatusReviewed">
        <dc:Bounds x="1280" y="400" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_ReviewedAndWrittenBack_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_ReviewedAndWrittenBack">
        <dc:Bounds x="1452" y="422" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_BuildAutoObservationPayload_di" bpmnElement="Task_BuildAutoObservationPayload">
        <dc:Bounds x="440" y="540" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_WriteAutoObservationToEpic_di" bpmnElement="Task_WriteAutoObservationToEpic">
        <dc:Bounds x="620" y="540" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_UpdateStatusAutoCompleted_di" bpmnElement="Task_UpdateStatusAutoCompleted">
        <dc:Bounds x="800" y="540" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_AutoCompleted_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_AutoCompleted">
        <dc:Bounds x="972" y="562" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_ClinicianReview_SafetyAlert_di" bpmnElement="Task_ClinicianReview_SafetyAlert">
        <dc:Bounds x="720" y="270" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_ClinicianReview_Standard_di" bpmnElement="Task_ClinicianReview_Standard">
        <dc:Bounds x="440" y="240" width="120" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_Start_To_Gateway_di" bpmnElement="Flow_Start_To_Gateway">
        <di:waypoint x="230" y="168" />
        <di:waypoint x="230" y="440" />
        <di:waypoint x="325" y="440" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="Flow_Gateway_To_SafetyAlert_di" bpmnElement="Flow_Gateway_To_SafetyAlert">
